REMARK: EX PARTE HEARING HELD ON 10/30/23 AT 11:00 A.M. DEPT. 302 BEFORE JUDGE RICHARD ULMER ON THE EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER/OSC RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION AND EX PARTE APPLICATION TO SEAL. A HEARING ON THE PRELIMINARY INJUCTION AND ON THE MOTION TO SEAL IS SET FOR WEDNESDAY, NOVEMBER 8, 2023, AT 1:30 P.M. IN DEPT. 302 BEFORE JUDGE RICHARD ULMER. MOVING PAPERS ARE TO BE FILED BY CLOSE OF BUSINESS ON 11/1/23. OPPOSITION IS DUE BY 11/6/23. THE BRIEFING SCHEDULE FOR THE MOTION TO SEAL IS THE SAME. COURTESY COPIES ARE TO BE DELIVERED TO DEPT. 302. THE COURT REQUESTS THAT THE PARTIES SUBMIT SINGLE-SIDED COURTESY COPIES.
